[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11011110 6
1 10100010 3
2 11110101 6
3 01100100 3
4 10010110 4
5 01111000 4
6 10101000 3
7 00110100 3

01 10 01111110 6
12 21 01111100 5
23 32 11110111 7
34 43 11101111 7
45 54 10001110 4
56 65 00011001 3
67 76 00111111 6
70 07 10110010 4

02 20 00000010 1
13 31 10001011 4
24 42 00011000 2
35 53 01100001 3
46 64 10010111 5
57 75 00100110 3
60 06 10001101 4
71 17 11001100 4

03 30 11110101 6 match 2
14 41 01100100 3 match 3
25 52 10010110 4 match 4
36 63 01111000 4 match 5
47 74 10101000 3 match 6
50 05 10010100 3
61 16 11110011 6
72 27 10110000 3

04 40 00011010 3
15 51 11101010 5
26 62 10001111 5
37 73 01000111 4
